titleStmt.title: SII 22.390: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 390. (A.R. No. 390 of 1906) TIRUCHIRAPALLI DISTRICT, PUDUKKOTTAI STATE, TIRUMAYYAM ROCK-CUT ŚIVA TEMPLE—AT THE SAME ENTRANCE, LEFT SIDE. RĀJĒNDRACHŌḶADĒVA—21ST YEAR (A.D. 1032-33)

summary.p: The inscription is badly damaged. It records an endowment of 35 kāśu to provide with the interest thereon, for the daily offerings to god Tirumeyyadēvar, by Śālāpam Vidiviḍaṅgaṉ of Mānamaṅgalam a brahmadēya village in Viṟaikkūṟṟam, a division of Śōḻamaṇḍalam. Mention is made of a coin called Rājēndraśōḻaṉ māḍai. The epigraph begins with the usual introduction Tirumaṉṉi Vaḷara etc.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tirumaṉṉi vaḷara Iru
c celviyum
perunteviye
cirttaṉic celviyum
vaṉavāciyum cuḷḷiccūḻ
naṇṇaṟkarumuraṇ maṇṇaikka
ṭakkamum porukaṭaliḻattaraicartamuṭiyummāṅkavar teviya ro
ṅkeḻil muṭiyum muṉṉavar pakkal teṉṉavar vaitta cuntaramuṭi
yum Intiranāramun teṇtirai Īḻamaṇṭalamuḻuvatum Eṟipa
muṟaimaiyiṟ cūṭuṅ kulataṉamākiya palar pukaḻ muṭiyum ceṅka
tir mālaiyuñ caṅkatir velait tolperuṅkāval pala pa
ḻantiyvuñ ceruvil ciṉavi lirupattorukālarai cukaḷai kaṭṭa paracurāmaṉ
mevaruñ cānti maṟṟivaraṇ karuti Iruttiya cempoṟṟiruttaku muṭiyum
payaṅkoṭu paḻimika muyaṅkiyil mutukiṭ ṭoḷitta ceya ciṅkaṉaḷap peru
m pukaḻoṭu piṭiyiliraṭṭapāṭi Eḻarai Ilakkamum navanetikkulap peruma
laikaḷum vikkiramavirac cakkara koṭṭamum mutirvaṭavallai matura maṇṭalamum kā
miṭaivaḷaiy nāmaṇak koṇamum veñcilaivirar pañcappaḷḷiyum pācaṭai
ppaḻaṉ mācuṇi tecamum Ayarvilvaṇ kirtti Ātinakaravaiyil
cantiraṉ tolkulattintirarataṉai viḷaiyamar kkaḷattuk kiḷaiyoṭum
piṭittup palataṉattoṭum taṉ kulataṉakku vaiyum kaṭṭaruñ ceṟi
miḷai Oṭṭa viṣayamum puccuracer nalkkocalaināṭun taṉmapāla
ṉai vemmuṉai Aḻittu vaṇṭuṟai colait taṇṭaputtiyum Ira
ṇacūraṉai muraṇukattākki tikkaṇakirttit takkaṇalāṭamum kovinta cantaṉ
māviḻittoṭa taṅkāta cāral vaṅkāḷa tecamum toṭukaṭaṟ caṅkeraṭṭal mahipālaṉai
veñcamar vīḷākattañcuvittaruḷi Oṇṭiṟala yāṉaiyum peṇṭir paṇṭāra
mum nittila neṭuṅkaṭaluttiralāṭamum veḷimalartirtta teṟipuṉal
kaṅkaiyum Alaikaṭalnaṭuviṟ palakalañ celuttic caṅkirāma vicaiya tuṅkapaṉ
marākiya kiṭārattaraiyaṉai vākayam porukaṭal kumpakkariyoṭu maka
ppaṭutturimaiyiṟ piṟakkiya perunetippiṟakkamum Ārttavan nakar
por toḻil vācalil viccātira toraṇamu moyttoḷir puṉaima
ṇipputavamum kaṉamaṇikkatavamum niṟai śrīvicaiyamum tuṟai
nir paṉṉaiyum paṉmalaiyū reyiṟṟoṉ malaiyūrum Āḻkaṭala
kaḻcūḻ māyiruṭiṅkamuṅ kalaṅkāval viṉai Ilaṅkā copamuṅ kāppu
ṟu niṟaipuṉal māpappāḷamuṅ kāvalampuricaiyil mevilipaṅkamum vaḷaip
pantūṟuṭai viḷaippantūṟuṅ kalaitakkor pukaḻ talaittakkolamu
titamāval viṉai mātavaliṅkamuṅ kalāmutir kaṭuntiṟa lilāmuri teca
mun teṉakkavār poḻil māṉakkavāramun toṭu kaṭaṟkāvaṟ kaṭumuraṭ kaṭāramu mā
p perun taṇṭāṟ koṇṭa kopparakecari paṉmarāṉa Uṭaiyār śrī
rājentracoḻa devarkku yāṇṭu [2 10 1] Āvatu coḻamaṇṭa
lattu viṟaikkūṟṟattu brahmadeyam mānamaṅkalattu cālāpattu tiru
kkaṉ vitiviṭaṅkaṉ tirumey paṇṭārattu
ya tevakaṉmikaḷ vacam poliyūṭṭukku vaitta kācu muppa
ttaiñcukkum palicaiyāka caṉtirātitta varai nellum
nellukku nittam muppattaiñci nāl
rājarājaṉ
puṟam kācu
kācu muppattai
cukkum tirumeyyadevarkku Amutupaṭikku
jentracoḻaṉ māṭaiyoṭokkum poṉ
mukkāl Ippoṉ
vārkku
Digital edition of SII 22.390 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
